summary: Comprehensive frontend testing of ChessVerse Vite+React landing page on preview URL. Verified all sections render, hero CTAs scroll, navigation works (desktop + mobile), WhatsApp floating button has correct href + message, gallery lightbox opens/closes, booking + contact forms POST proper JSON to https://formsubmit.co/ajax/chessverse07@gmail.com and transition to success state on 200, contact WhatsApp banner href correct. Mobile viewport (390px) renders correctly with working menu toggle. No console errors detected. Backend testing skipped per request (pure-frontend Vite app).
critical_code_review_comments: Booking.tsx button label says 'Book Free Demo' inside form while the page heading says 'Free Class' and CTA in nav also says 'Book Free Demo' — consistent, no action needed.

Hero.tsx Scene constructs 220 floating particles + heavy 3D scene every mount — performance-fine on desktop but might want a reduced/Suspense fallback for low-end mobile; consider rendering simpler fallback when window.matchMedia('(max-width: 640px)') matches.

Both forms catch network errors gracefully with WhatsApp/email fallback — good. Note Formsubmit's first submission requires email activation; setStatus('sent') is shown on any 200 which is correct expected behavior.
WhatsAppButton.tsx delayed mount (1.2s) is intentional but means automated tests must wait — fine since data-testid still present immediately.

Gallery lightbox closes on backdrop click which also captures click on inner image (because parent has onClick) — content image clicks close too. Inner close button uses stopPropagation correctly. Acceptable UX.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All data-testids are wired: main-nav, nav-logo, nav-link-{about,courses,achievements,coaches,gallery,testimonials,contact}, nav-mobile-toggle, nav-mobile-link-*, nav-cta-demo, hero-headline, hero-eyebrow, hero-cta-{join,demo,contact}, hero-stat-{students,years,trophies}, booking-form, booking-input-{name,phone,email,time}, booking-level-{beginner,intermediate,advanced}, booking-mode-{online,offline}, booking-submit, booking-whatsapp, booking-success, contact-form, contact-input-{name,email,phone,message}, contact-submit, contact-success, contact-whatsapp-banner, contact-info-0..3, social-{facebook,instagram,youtube}, gallery-item-0..6, gallery-lightbox, whatsapp-float-btn. Forms post to https://formsubmit.co/ajax/chessverse07@gmail.com with correct JSON. To test forms without sending real emails, monkey-patch window.fetch in browser context to intercept formsubmit.co URLs and return 200.
